title: About | Ohio Pride
description: Ohio Pride is a nonpartisan, state-level political action committee dedicated to building political power for LGBTQ+ equality across every corner of Ohio.

og.title: About | Ohio Pride
og.description: Nonpartisan, state-level PAC endorsing pro-equality candidates across Ohio.
